description: Validates hex's TypeScript autonomous execution by building a food delivery domain with hexagonal architecture

metadata.expected_outcome: Demonstrates language-agnostic workplan execution with proper TypeScript compilation gates
success_criteria: Compile gate uses 'npx tsc --noEmit' instead of 'cargo check'
All evidence requirements pass with TypeScript-specific commands
metadata.test_objective: Validate hex autonomous execution on TypeScript project

tasks.title: Create OrderStatus enum in src/core/domain/OrderStatus.ts with values: Pending, Confirmed, Preparing, OutForDelivery, Delivered, Cancelled

Create Order domain entity in src/core/domain/Order.ts with OrderId, CustomerId, RestaurantId, Items[], OrderStatus, totalAmount (Money type), createdAt, updatedAt. Include factory method createOrder() and status transition validation.

phases.title: Domain Layer: Order entity and value objects

tasks.title: Create IOrderRepository port in src/core/ports/IOrderRepository.ts with async methods: findById(orderId): Promise<Order | null>, save(order): Promise<void>, findByCustomerId(customerId): Promise<Order[]>, updateStatus(orderId, status): Promise<void>

Create InMemoryOrderRepository in src/adapters/secondary/InMemoryOrderRepository.ts implementing IOrderRepository with Map<string, Order> storage. Import Order from domain, IOrderRepository from ports.
Create Order.test.ts in src/core/domain/ using vitest. Test: order creation, status transitions (Pending→Confirmed→Preparing), validation rules, totalAmount calculation.
Create InMemoryOrderRepository.test.ts in src/adapters/secondary/ using vitest. Test: save/retrieve order, findByCustomerId returns correct orders, updateStatus persists changes.

phases.title: Test Layer: Domain and adapter tests

title: Test TypeScript Support: Food Delivery Service Domain
